item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly brakes the repeated local-patch pattern instead of directly adding another permanent notice, while allowing a bounded emergency notice. Turn 2 preserves the brake under pressure and includes all three required emergency elements: one-time temporary handling, no baseline lift for the entrance page to absorb future scattered prompts, and a structural repair deadline by the following Monday."}
